span.p:
1. Replace direct ClaudeRunner/TmuxAdapter construction
with adapter factory entrypoints

span.p:
2. Replace provider-specific session fields
with canonical AgentSessionRef

span.p:
3. Separate role selection from adapter selection
so lead and runner are swappable

span.p: 4. Make runner path adapter-first before touching lead path
